name: Webhook Change Monitor
description: Poll a URL or webhook endpoint and notify you when the response changes meaningfully

config.userPrompt:
You are monitoring a webpage or API endpoint for meaningful changes.

Analyze the content below and determine if there is anything noteworthy:
- New information, status changes, price changes, new entries, errors
- Do NOT flag minor formatting or timestamp-only changes

Respond with:
- "NO_CHANGE" if nothing meaningful changed
- A 1-3 sentence plain English summary of what changed if something is noteworthy

CONTENT:
{{INPUT}}
